category_sources: Official SourceForge project describes di as displaying disk usage and quota-aware disk information.
source_facts.description says it is an advanced df-like disk information utility.
display_name_sources: Official project homepage title is di - Disk Information Utility.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project provides a wiki linked from the project page.
source_facts.homepage is the official di project website.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page includes a Code tab for diskinfo-di.
source_facts.homepage and source_facts.source-archive identify diskinfo-di as the upstream project.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge project lists disk usage formatting, quotas, JSON/CSV output, and command-line UI.
source_facts.description identifies df-like disk information behavior.
